description: Supplications and adhkar — daily duas, morning/evening, situational, from Quran and Sunnah

questions.question: What is the dua to say before eating? Give Arabic, transliteration, and meaning.
What is the dua after eating? Give Arabic, transliteration, source, and meaning.
What is the morning adhkar the Prophet ﷺ recommended? Give at least 3 with Arabic.
What is the dua when waking up from sleep? Give Arabic, transliteration, and source.
What is the dua for entering the masjid and leaving it? Give Arabic and hadith source.
What are the duas for traveling? Give the dua to recite when starting a journey.
What is the dua for hardship and distress? Give Dua Yunus with Arabic.
What is the dua after salah (prayer)? Give the common post-prayer adhkar with Arabic.
What is the dua for seeking forgiveness (Sayyid al-Istighfar)? Give full Arabic and source.
What are the duas from Surah Al-Baqarah? List the key supplications from this surah.
What is the dua to say upon hearing the adhan (call to prayer)?
What is the evening adhkar? Give at least 3 supplications with Arabic.
What is the dua for entering and leaving the toilet? Give Arabic and source.
What are the duas for the sick person and visiting the sick? Give Arabic and hadith.
What is the dua for seeking guidance (Istikhara)? Give the full Arabic text and how to perform it.
